basics.name: Ivan Kornienko
basics.label: Senior DevSecOps & Cloud Solutions Architect
basics.summary: Senior Cloud Infrastructure Consultant with 19 years in IT, including 14 years contracting for top US/EU companies. Expert in Cloud Solutions Architecture (GCP, AWS), automated CI/CD/Sec pipelines, high-scale Kubernetes management, GitOps, MLOps, and AI Reliability (scaling LLM workloads, Karpenter, cost optimization). Contributor to Google Cloud Foundation Toolkit.

work.name: METRO Digital
work.summary: Kubernetes migration into GCP, NoSQL database migration, GKE optimization.
highlights: Designed detailed GCP migration and NoSQL database migration plans.
Successfully migrated a fleet of nearly 100 microservices into GCP.
Developed custom Terraform modules and Kustomize templates.
Optimized GKE clusters for performance and cloud costs.
Mentored full-time engineers in modern DevOps practices.

work.name: Voyc AI
work.summary: AI-powered compliance monitoring AWS cloud design and automation.
highlights: Designed highly available and cost-efficient AWS Cloud Architecture.
Automated infrastructure provisioning using OpenTofu, Terraform, and Terragrunt.
Implemented Karpenter for AWS EKS to achieve dynamic, cost-optimized scaling of Kubernetes nodes for AI workloads.

work.name: METRO Digital
work.summary: GitLab to GitHub migration, internal CD to ArgoCD migration, GCP migration, and Gateway API implementation.
highlights: Implemented system decomposition using a structured 5-layer infrastructure pattern in Terraform.
Implemented GitOps (tag-based deployment, PR builds, merge builds) with GCP Cloud Build.
Developed reusable Terraform modules and Helm charts with fully automated CI/CD checks.
Migrated secrets to GCP Secret Manager, automated using Jenkins, Terraform, and SOPS.
Migrated microservice deployments to ArgoCD with an app-of-apps pattern for about 100 microservices.
Replaced HAProxy load balancers with GCP Load Balancers and GCP Private Service Connect (PSC).

work.name: Elsewhen Ltd
work.summary: ETL pipeline implementation and IaC design for an advertisement firm.
highlights: Redesigned Cloud Architecture, Continuous Integration, and IaC pipelines.
Implemented System Decomposition with a 5-layer infrastructure in Terraform.
Developed ETL pipelines in Python for Google Cloud Composer (Apache Airflow).
Migrated Cloud Composer from Apache Airflow 1 to Airflow 2.

work.name: GlobalLogic
work.summary: Led DevOps transformation programs, cloud architecture setups, training courses, and Google CFT development.
highlights: Planned and driven DevOps transformation for American Robotics Corp using AWS (EKS, Lambda, S3, Terragrunt, ArgoCD).
Managed DevOps scope and IAM organization for a next-gen TV platform in GCP, deploying GKE, EKS, and Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines.
Built a Bare-Metal/Public Cloud Hybrid SDLC accelerator with Kubernetes and ArgoCD.
Designed Kiev's Smart City Platform (Green Wave) deploying GKE, Cloud Functions, and Cloud Build.
Contributed official modules to the Google Cloud Foundation Toolkit and HashiCorp organizations.
DevOps Training Lead: Wrote syllabus and coached trainee systems engineers in Linux, networking, python, and cloud.

work.name: EPAM Systems
work.summary: Kubernetes migrations, CI/CD consulting, mentoring, and environment configuration for major US clients.
highlights: Drove migration to Kubernetes in California for an American MLM client, writing Helm charts and Ansible roles.
Developed CI/CD solutions in Connecticut for a major American Investment Management firm.
Mentored trainee engineers, achieving a 5/5 score for lectures on DevOps, Linux, and IaC.
Maintained and optimized multi-node Hybris and Apache e-commerce clusters using Ansible, Python, and Jenkins DSL.
